sglang.title: [PD] Fix large page size + chunk prefill
sglang.author: ByronHsu
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

We should pagify index slices instead of directly using kv index slices.
Before
req.disagg_kv_sender.send(page_indices, slice(start_idx, end_idx), is_last)

After
req.disagg_kv_sender.send(page_indices, slice(page_start_idx, page_end_idx), is_last)

Modifications

Pagify index slices
If

sglang.title: Feat: Implement JSON Mode (response_format.type="json_object")
sglang.author: kyle-pena-kuzco
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
This PR implements a feature which is supported by both OpenAI and VLLM called "JSON Mode".
JSON Mode is activated by providing response_format.type = "json_object" .
JSON Mode is a different feature than "Structured Outputs", although it is similar.
If response_format.type = "json_object

sglang.title: compressed_tensors: port w8a16 fp8 from vllm
sglang.author: vhain
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Fixes #4851
FP8 W8A8 could be the most popular FP8 quant method when using compressed_tensors with llm-compressor, as it's the one llm-compressor's example uses by default.
However FP8 W8A8 kernel is not supported on machines with CUDA compute capability < 89, and the original logic tries

sglang.title: Perform Batch Tokenization.
sglang.author: sundar24295s
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

The current tokenizer_manager processes batch workloads by sequentially tokenizing each prompt before sending it to the DP. This creates overhead in the tokenization phase.
We can improve tokenization performance by leveraging the batch tokenization capabilities of fast tokenizers to pro
